title: Ultraman Tiga & Ultraman Dyna & Ultraman Gaia: Battle in Hyperspace
original_title: ウルトラマンティガ・ウルトラマンダイナ&ウルトラマンガイア 超時空の大決戦
overview: A young boy discovers a magical rock that can make any wish come true. But the rock is stolen by a school bully who uses it to create a powerful and dangerous monster. The only way to stop the beast is to enlist the help of superhero Ultraman Gaia. The boy does everything he can to help the XIG Team, a brave group of humans who have direct contact with Ultraman Gaia as well as Ultraman Dyna and Ultraman Tiga.

trailers.title: ウルトラマンガイア！～超時空の大決戦～[MAD]

trailer_groups.title: ウルトラマンガイア！～超時空の大決戦～[MAD]

en.title: ウルトラマンガイア！～超時空の大決戦～[MAD]
